feed.summary: Brilliant Earth Group (NASDAQ:BRLT) reported a Q4 loss of $0.06 EPS, missing analyst estimates by $0.08, with revenue of $124.4 million also falling short of expectations. Despite this, the quarter was the company's largest ever, contributing to full-year sales of $437.5 million, up 3.6% year-over-year. The company faces significant gross margin headwinds due to rising gold and platinum prices, with 2026 gross margin guided to the mid-50s% and Q1 adjusted EBITDA expected to be negative.

feed.title: Callaway Golf Surges 55% in 6 Months: Is the Stock Still Attractive?
feed.summary: Callaway Golf Company (CALY) has seen its shares surge 55.4% in the past six months, significantly outperforming the industry. This growth is attributed to strategic moves such as divesting Jack Wolfskin and a stake in Topgolf, which generated cash to repay debt, and a renewed focus on its core golf equipment business. The company also benefits from strong golf participation trends, product innovation, and an attractive valuation compared to its peers, holding a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

feed.title: Coke & Meals: Making Coca-Cola the preferred choice with food
feed.summary: Coca-Cola HBC's "Coke & Meals" platform aims to establish Coca-Cola, especially Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, as the preferred beverage for meals, turning everyday eating into enjoyable moments of connection. The platform leverages a global framework with local execution to create culturally relevant activations for consumers and value for customers. It integrates various brands from the portfolio across retail, digital, and mass media to drive engagement and enhance meal experiences year-round.

feed.title: Mizuho Lowers BellRing Brands (NYSE:BRBR) Price Target to $34.00
feed.summary: Mizuho has reduced its price target for BellRing Brands (NYSE:BRBR) from $40.00 to $34.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 93.18% from the stock's last closing price. Despite the lowered target, BellRing Brands recently surpassed quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, reporting $0.37 EPS and $537.3 million in revenue.

feed.title: Kroger promotes 84.51 president to new AI role, plans stores in two new cities - Cincinnati Business Courier
feed.summary: Kroger is expanding its market presence by opening stores in two new cities and has created a new leadership position focused on artificial intelligence. Yael Cosset, formerly president of Kroger's data science firm 84.51, has been appointed to this new AI role. The move signals Kroger's increased commitment to leveraging AI technologies.

feed.title: Fastenal (FAST) Sees 13.3% Increase in February Sales
feed.summary: Fastenal (FAST) reported a significant 13.3% increase in net sales for February, reaching over $710 million, with daily sales also climbing by the same percentage. This growth is attributed to the company's strategy of expanding on-site locations and its role as a comprehensive outsourcing partner for industrial customers. Fastenal demonstrates strong financial health with impressive revenue growth, profitability metrics, and a conservative approach to leverage, though its valuation metrics indicate a premium trading position.

feed.title: Costco Stock Is Rising Ahead of Earnings as Comparable Sales Strengthen
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale's stock is rallying, recouping previous losses, as its 2026 fiscal year shows a stronger start compared to 2025. Investors are anticipating the company's fiscal second-quarter results on Thursday, with expectations of continued sales strength. Key focus areas include renewal rates, tariff refunds, and the possibility of another special dividend.

feed.title: GAINESVILLE (FL), WE'RE COMING FOR YOU! American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:AREB) Rolls into Gainesville with 4X NHRA World Champion Matt Hagan for a High-Energy Meet & Greet at Total Wine & More
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:AREB) is bringing 4x NHRA World Champion Matt Hagan to Gainesville, Florida for a meet and greet at Total Wine & More on March 5th, 2026. This event, ahead of the NHRA Gatornationals, promotes American Rebel Light Beer, described as "America’s Patriotic Beer." The company highlights the beer's quality ingredients and its rapid expansion into 18 states since its launch in April 2024.

feed.title: GAINESVILLE (FL), WE'RE COMING FOR YOU! American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:AREB) Rolls into Gainesville with 4X NHRA World Champion Matt Hagan for a High-Energy Meet & Greet at Total Wine & More
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:AREB), makers of American Rebel Light Beer, is hosting a meet and greet event in Gainesville, Florida, with 4X NHRA World Champion Matt Hagan on March 5, 2026, ahead of the NHRA Gatornationals weekend. feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. feed.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Angi, Zoom, Photronics, Cloudflare, and Bally's
feed.summary: This article highlights several companies whose stocks made significant moves yesterday, detailing the reasons behind their increases. Angi rose after launching its app within ChatGPT, Zoom saw a broad rally, Photronics' stock increased due to an analyst upgrade, Cloudflare grew following positive remarks from its CFO about AI, and Bally's shares climbed after acquiring a casino development site in the Bronx.

feed.title: British American Tobacco (LON:BATS) Insider Tadeu Marroco Purchases 4 Shares
feed.summary: British American Tobacco insider Tadeu Marroco recently purchased 4 shares of the company's stock for £180.12, following smaller purchases in January and February. Despite these insider transactions, which are small in size, MarketBeat maintains a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of GBX 4,500. The company shows strong profitability metrics, including a net margin of 30.23% and a P/E ratio of 31.90.

feed.title: Nasdaq Surges Over 1%: Investor Sentiment Improves, But Greed Index Remains In 'Fear' Zone
feed.summary: The Nasdaq Composite surged over 1% on Wednesday, with U.S. stocks generally closing higher as investor sentiment showed some improvement, possibly influenced by reports of potential U.S.-Iran diplomatic talks. Despite this upturn, the CNN Money Fear and Greed index remained in the "Fear" zone, reflecting underlying market caution. Key economic data showed an increase in private sector jobs and a rise in the ISM services PMI, while some companies like Latham Group saw significant gains after strong earnings.

feed.title: Mattel Inc (MAT, US5766901012): What the Latest Earnings, Licensing Deals and Fed Policy Mean for Gl
feed.summary: Mattel Inc. is navigating the post-pandemic toy market by focusing on intellectual property, entertainment, and cost control, positioning it as a cyclical consumer stock with brand optionality. Key drivers for international investors include upcoming earnings, U.S. consumer spending trends influenced by Federal Reserve policy, and the company's ability to monetize its portfolio across various media. The article analyzes Mattel's current market situation, recent news flow, SEC filings, technical chart considerations, and the macroeconomic backdrop to outline scenarios for MAT through 2026.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Mission Produce (AVO) After Recent Share Price Strength
feed.summary: Mission Produce (AVO) has seen mixed stock performance recently, with a significant gain year-to-date, but Simply Wall St's valuation checks score it 2 out of 6, indicating potential overvaluation. Both discounted cash flow (DCF) and price-to-earnings (P/E) analyses suggest the stock is currently overvalued compared to its intrinsic value and fair ratio. The article highlights that while the stock trades above its estimated DCF value and P/E fair ratio, investor narratives and different financial models can lead to varying conclusions on its attractiveness.

feed.title: Murphy USA modernizing site branding
feed.summary: Murphy USA plans to implement a refreshed store design, including a new color scheme and modern aesthetics, starting in the second half of 2026. These updates, costing only a few thousand dollars per store, will involve a more blue-heavy color scheme, gray brick exteriors, white interior walls, and improved lighting and signage. The new design aims to enhance the customer experience and will be applied to new builds and raze-and-rebuilds, which are expected to total around 80 locations annually through 2030.

feed.title: Five Below: A Top Performing Retailer Trading At Highs, Shares Fairly Valued (NASDAQ:FIVE)
feed.summary: Five Below (NASDAQ:FIVE) has emerged as one of the top-performing retailers over the last year, with its shares trading at high valuations. Despite the rich multiple, the author believes it is justified given the company's strong performance and positive forward outlook. The article suggests a 'hold' rating for FIVE ahead of its upcoming Q4 earnings release.

feed.title: A Look At Boot Barn Holdings (BOOT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Swings
feed.summary: Boot Barn Holdings (BOOT) has seen recent share price fluctuations, although its long-term performance remains strong. Despite a current share price of $184.29, analysts consider it undervalued with a fair value of $227.14, driven by expectations of continued store expansion and resilient margins. However, its P/E ratio of 25.6x is higher than the industry average, suggesting less room for error if growth underperforms.

feed.title: Dave & Buster’s coming to Bristol, TN, company says
feed.summary: Dave & Buster's has confirmed its plans to open a new entertainment venue in Bristol, Tennessee. The location will feature hundreds of arcade games, food, drinks, and sports viewing. Details regarding the exact location within Bristol and the opening timeline have not yet been released.

feed.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Grocery Outlet Following Downbeat Q4 Results
feed.summary: Following disappointing Q4 results and a lowered FY26 sales outlook, Grocery Outlet Holding Corp (NASDAQ: GO) saw its shares dip significantly. Several analysts, including those from Jefferies, Morgan Stanley, and Telsey Advisory Group, downgraded their ratings and reduced price targets for the stock. The company's Q4 earnings and sales both missed analyst consensus estimates, with CEO Jason Potter acknowledging that more work is needed on their strategic priorities.

feed.title: Dermata Therapeutics Launches Tome Skincare Line to Address Daily Skin Health Needs
feed.summary: Dermata Therapeutics has introduced Tome Skincare, a new product line aimed at broader daily skincare needs, diversifying its portfolio beyond treatments for specific skin conditions like acne and rosacea. This launch represents a strategic move for the company to expand its presence in the competitive skincare market. While specific product details are not yet disclosed, the initiative aligns with Dermata's mission to offer innovative skin health solutions.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Cracker Barrel Old Country Store to $31 From $26, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Cracker Barrel Old Country Store (CBRL) to $31 from $26, while retaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst various recent news for the company, including its Q2 2026 earnings, revised 2026 guidance, and a declared quarterly dividend. The company operates 658 Cracker Barrel stores and 68 Maple Street Biscuit Company stores.

feed.title: Gap Likely To Report Lower Q4 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
feed.summary: Gap Inc. is expected to report lower earnings for its fourth quarter, with analysts forecasting 45 cents per share, down from 54 cents per share last year, though revenue is anticipated to increase to $4.24 billion. Several top-performing analysts have recently revised their forecasts and price targets for GAP, generally expressing a positive outlook with "Outperform" or "Buy" ratings and increased price targets. The company also announced a 6% increase to its first-quarter dividend.

feed.title: Walmart Announces Digital Shelf Label Rollout Across All U.S. Stores
feed.summary: Walmart plans to implement digital shelf labels (DSLs) in all its U.S. stores this year, expanding on the 2,300 locations already using the technology. DSLs ensure accurate pricing and help employees save time by eliminating manual price changes and assisting with item location and restocking through LED technology. This initiative is part of Walmart's broader technological upgrades, including an AI-powered shopping experience with Google.

feed.title: Sysco Announces CFO Transition Process
feed.summary: Sysco Corporation announced that EVP and CFO Kenny Cheung will step down to pursue another opportunity, with Brandon Sewell appointed as Interim CFO effective March 6, 2026. Sewell, a long-serving leader within Sysco's finance organization, will ensure continuity during the transition. The company reaffirmed its fiscal year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance at the high end of $4.50 to $4.60.

feed.title: McDonald’s Big Arch, Starbucks corporate office, Freddy’s
feed.summary: This article covers viral buzz around McDonald's Big Arch burger and CEO Chris Kempczinski's awkward video, Starbucks opening a new corporate office in Nashville to be closer to suppliers and aid North American growth plans, and Freddy's largest franchisee, JRI Hospitality, acquiring an additional 43 locations to expand its portfolio to 130 Freddy's restaurants across 18 states.

feed.title: McDonald's Targets 50K Restaurants by 2027: Is Expansion the Key?
feed.summary: McDonald's is aggressively expanding its global restaurant count, aiming for 50,000 locations by the end of 2027. This growth, expected mainly in international markets like China, is supported by strong demand and returns from new stores. The company's strategy also includes a "3 for 3" approach focused on value, marketing, and menu innovation, while competitors like Restaurant Brands International and Yum! Brands are also pursuing significant global expansion.

feed.title: Investors Are Actively Looking Into lululemon athletica inc. (LULU): Essential Information You Should Be Aware Of
feed.summary: Lululemon (LULU) is attracting significant investor attention, with its stock performance showing a 2.7% decline in the last month compared to broader market trends. While recent earnings and revenue have exceeded analyst expectations, future growth projections indicate a slowdown, with earnings per share expected to decrease for the current quarter and fiscal year. The company holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), suggesting a neutral short-term outlook based on fundamental analysis and earnings forecast adjustments.

feed.title: Kroger Offers Cautious Sales Forecast as New CEO Takes Over
feed.summary: Kroger's new CEO, Greg Foran, is implementing a value-focused strategy to boost sales, including cost-cutting, price investments, and enhancing customer experience. Despite a cautious sales forecast of 1% to 2% comparable sales growth, the company aims to accelerate its e-commerce business and improve its fresh and private-label offerings in a competitive grocery market. Foran, known for turning around Walmart's domestic business, faces challenges as consumers seek value and competitors like Walmart and Aldi intensify their low-price strategies.

feed.title: Home Depot to offer real-time tracking of big and bulky deliveries
feed.summary: Home Depot is launching a real-time tracking tool for big and bulky deliveries aimed at professional renovators, remodelers, builders, and specialty tradespeople. This new feature, accessible via the Home Depot mobile app and e-commerce site, will provide minute-by-minute updates, including truck route and remaining stops, utilizing GPS data from the new Home Depot Driver Handheld application. This initiative is part of Home Depot's broader strategy to enhance services for its Pro customers and streamline the delivery experience for large building materials.

feed.title: New Chipotle Mexican Grill restaurant coming to Fort Pierce. See where
feed.summary: A second Chipotle Mexican Grill is set to open in Fort Pierce, located next to a Starbucks at 2039 S. U.S. 1 in Gateway Plaza. Construction was ongoing as of March 5, with no immediate opening date available. This new location will add to the six existing Chipotle restaurants on the Treasure Coast.

feed.title: Costco Stock Is Rallying as Sales Strength Builds Ahead of Earnings
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale's stock is rallying as it approaches its fiscal second-quarter earnings report on Thursday. The company has shown improved comparable sales, and investors are keenly watching for details on renewal rates, tariff refunds, and the potential for another special dividend, suggesting a positive outlook for 2026 after a challenging 2025.

feed.title: DA Davidson cuts Best Buy stock price target on lower earnings outlook
feed.summary: DA Davidson has lowered its price target for Best Buy Co. Inc. to $78 from $85, while maintaining a Buy rating, due to reduced fiscal 2026 and 2027 earnings per share estimates. This adjustment follows Best Buy's fourth-quarter results and 2026 guidance, which missed expectations. Despite the lowered outlook, the stock reacted positively, and InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Starbucks (SBUX) Analyst Rating: Guggenheim Raises Price Target to $95 | SBUX Stock News
feed.summary: Guggenheim analyst Gregory Francfort maintained a Neutral rating on Starbucks (SBUX) and raised the price target from $90 to $95. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook amidst changing market conditions. Other analysts have also recently issued varying ratings and price targets for Starbucks, with the average target from 33 analysts being $100.39, implying a 3.33% upside from the current price, and the average brokerage recommendation being "Outperform."

feed.title: Build-A-Bear Workshop (NYSE:BBW) Raised to "Hold" at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Build-A-Bear Workshop (NYSE:BBW) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating, following several other analysts maintaining "buy" ratings and adjusting price targets. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings. Build-A-Bear Workshop currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with an average price target of $64.75.

feed.title: Dow Falls Over 300 Points; Kroger Posts Mixed Results
feed.summary: U.S. stocks, including the Dow Jones, NASDAQ, and S&P 500, experienced declines on Thursday morning. Kroger Co. reported mixed fourth-quarter results, beating EPS estimates but missing on sales, and provided FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance slightly below analyst expectations. The article also highlights leading and lagging sectors, commodity prices, and individual stock movements including significant gains for Impact BioMedical Inc. and Blue Hat Interactive Entertainment Technology, and drops for Medicus Pharma Ltd. and FTC Solar Inc.

feed.title: The Home Depot to Launch Real-Time Delivery Tracker for Pro Customers
feed.summary: The Home Depot is set to launch the industry's first real-time delivery tracker for large materials for its pro customers by the end of Q1 2026. This feature, available on their app and website, will provide minute-by-minute updates, truck route visibility, and estimated delivery times using GPS data from delivery trucks. The initiative aims to enhance transparency and efficiency for pro customers on busy job sites.

feed.title: This obscure legal clause is holding back US malls. Simon Property Group got Saks Global to forfeit it.
feed.summary: Simon Property Group leveraged a $100 million investment offer into Saks Global to get the luxury department store company to forfeit reciprocal easement agreements (REAs) at nearly 60 of its malls. These REAs are legal clauses that have historically granted anchor tenants veto power over mall renovations and changes, hindering modernization efforts. Although Saks Global has since filed for bankruptcy and the investment is largely lost, Simon's CEO views it as a strategic win, allowing the REIT to move forward with property development without needing anchor tenant approval.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) Cut to "Hold" at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research downgraded Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) from "strong-buy" to "hold". Other analysts have also issued varied ratings, resulting in an average "Hold" rating and a $119.00 price target. The company recently beat EPS expectations but slightly missed revenue, and an insider sold a significant number of shares.

feed.title: El Pollo Loco makes menu innovation a big priority for 2026 (LOCO:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: El Pollo Loco (LOCO) is prioritizing culinary innovation for 2026, with plans to introduce five new menu items. The restaurant chain is currently testing these innovations in approximately 60 locations across California and Utah. This initiative aims to refresh its offerings and attract more customers.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Names Gloria Anderson as the Next Headliner for Life Out Here
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company announced Gloria Anderson from Luling, Texas, as the winner of its Life Out Here Emerging Artist Program. Anderson's original song "A Little Bit of Cowboy" was selected from thousands of submissions, embodying the spirit of hard work and persistence. As the winner, Anderson will receive a unique Nashville experience, including mentorship and recording opportunities, reinforcing Tractor Supply's commitment to supporting rural culture and emerging country music talent.

feed.title: CVS taps Google Cloud to roll out AI-powered health platform
feed.summary: CVS Health is partnering with Google Cloud to launch Health100, an AI-powered health platform scheduled for initial rollout in 2026. This platform aims to integrate data from various sources to provide customers with real-time health management assistance and offer faster care options with reduced out-of-pocket spending. Health100 will utilize agentic AI and Google Cloud's AI technologies to create a consumer-centric system connecting pharmacies, providers, and digital health systems.

feed.title: General Mills completes removal of certified colors from school foods
feed.summary: General Mills announced that it has completed the removal of certified colors from its entire portfolio of K-12 school foods, achieving this goal ahead of its summer 2026 commitment. This milestone was reached by reformulating Lucky Charms 25% Less Sugar Cereal, making 100% of its K-12 school food products free of certified colors. The company has further commitments to remove certified colors from its U.S. cereal portfolio by summer 2026 and its complete U.S. retail portfolio by the end of 2027.

feed.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: BJ’s Wholesale Club and The Toro Company
feed.summary: BJ’s Wholesale Club and The Toro Company recently released their quarterly earnings reports, showcasing varied performances. BJ's Wholesale Club exceeded EPS expectations but missed on revenue, driven by strong membership growth and digital sales. The Toro Company, conversely, surpassed expectations with increased diluted EPS and net sales, primarily due to strong demand in its Professional segment. Both companies have positive outlooks for fiscal 2026, with plans for continued investment and strategic growth despite dynamic market conditions.

feed.title: School cafeterias drop certified colors as General Mills hits K-12 goal early
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE: GIS) has announced that all of its K-12 school food products are now made without certified colors, achieving this goal ahead of its summer 2026 commitment. This initiative highlights the company's commitment to product innovation, safety, and quality in foodservice. General Mills also stated its plans to remove certified colors from its entire U.S. cereal portfolio by summer 2026 and its full U.S. retail portfolio by the end of 2027.

feed.title: New checkout tech coming to 900 Pilot travel centers serving 1.2M a day
feed.summary: NCR Voyix (NYSE: VYX) has secured a five-year exclusive platform agreement with Pilot, North America's largest travel center operator. This expanded partnership will see Pilot deploy Voyix's point-of-sale solutions, including retail and commercial fuel, across its more than 900 locations, serving 1.2 million guests daily. The collaboration aims to modernize Pilot's tech stack, enhance operational resilience, and improve the guest experience through NCR Voyix's AI-enabled, microservices architecture.

feed.title: VenHub Secures Agreements for Six New Autonomous Smart Store Locations Across Las Vegas
feed.summary: VenHub Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: VHUB) has announced agreements for the deployment of six new autonomous Smart Store locations across Las Vegas, bolstering its presence in the city where its headquarters are located. These Smart Stores will provide 24/7 contactless access to essentials using robotics, AI, and mobile-first checkout, serving both residents and tourists. The expansion highlights VenHub's model of enabling independent operators to manage stores while the company provides technology and maintenance, aiming to transform retail with continuous, adaptable access.

feed.title: Turning Point Brands Deepens Shift To Nicotine Pouches And Modern Oral Growth
feed.summary: Turning Point Brands (NYSE:TPB) is heavily investing in its Modern Oral segment, particularly nicotine pouches, by rolling out its ALP brand into physical retail and expanding marketing efforts. This strategic shift aims to capitalize on growing consumer interest in oral nicotine formats and mitigate impacts from tariffs and regulations affecting traditional products. While this means higher near-term spending and potential margin pressure, it aligns TPB with a high-growth category that already accounts for a significant portion of its sales.

feed.title: Jack in the Box Selects Restaurant365 As Its Sole Back-Office Inventory Platform
feed.summary: Jack in the Box Inc. has chosen Restaurant365 as its exclusive back-office inventory solution for all 2,128 corporate and franchisee locations. This partnership aims to streamline the brand's technology, provide real-time financial and operational visibility, and enhance profitability and execution across its extensive network. Doug Cook, CTO of Jack in the Box, highlighted that Restaurant365 offers a unified, restaurant-specific platform that integrates seamlessly, automates manual processes, and scales with the company's growth.

feed.title: Tech deal puts 2,128 Jack in the Box locations on one system
feed.summary: Jack in the Box has implemented Restaurant365 as its mandatory back-office inventory platform across all 2,128 corporate and franchisee locations. This move centralizes inventory, sales, food cost, and labor visibility, aiming to simplify the technology stack and improve franchisee profitability and operational execution. The partnership followed a proof of concept and pilot program, with Restaurant365 also providing accounting services for roughly half of Jack in the Box restaurants.

feed.title: Royal Cup Moves to Acquire Farmer Brothers in All-Cash Deal
feed.summary: Royal Cup Coffee & Tea announced plans to acquire Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. in an all-cash deal worth approximately $28 million, taking the publicly traded company private. This acquisition follows a period of mixed financial results for Farmer Brothers, which saw flat net sales and a widening net loss in recent fiscal periods.

feed.title: BATH & BODY WORKS, INC. (NYSE: BBWI) SHAREHOLDER ALERT
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for Bath & Body Works, Inc. (NYSE: BBWI) investors. The firm reminds investors of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit, alleging that the company made misrepresentations regarding its financial guidance between June 4, 2024, and November 19, 2025. Investors who lost money during this period are encouraged to contact Bernstein Liebhard LLP to discuss their legal options and the possibility of serving as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Massimo Group Expands National Retail Footprint with Authorization to Place Core Product Across 1,000 Stores
feed.summary: Massimo Group (NASDAQ: MAMO) announced that a major national rural lifestyle retail partner has authorized the placement of one core product in 1,000 U.S. retail locations, involving an initial rollout of approximately 2,400 units. This significant expansion, supported by in-store and online sales, establishes a scalable foundation for potential broader distribution across the retailer's 2,200 U.S. locations, contingent on sales performance. CEO David Shan emphasized this as a validation of Massimo's model and a foundation for sustainable growth and shareholder value.

feed.title: Powersports maker Massimo lands shelf space in 1,000 rural stores
feed.summary: Massimo Group (NASDAQ: MAMO) has secured authorization from a national rural lifestyle retailer to place one core product in 1,000 U.S. retail locations, involving an initial rollout of approximately 2,400 units. This distribution will utilize both in-store and online platforms, establishing a foundation for potential broader expansion across the retailer's 2,200 U.S. locations, contingent on sales performance. The company sees this as a validation of its model and a pathway for scalable growth and shareholder value, despite a historical pattern of market skepticism following positive news.

feed.title: New VistaPrint AI tool gives small businesses free, ready-to-print logos
feed.summary: VistaPrint has launched an AI Logomaker tool specifically designed for small businesses, enabling them to create professional, print-ready logos without design skills or a large budget. The tool uses generative AI to produce unique logo concepts based on simple user prompts and offers extensive editing capabilities. Small business owners receive free, scalable SVG, PDF, and PNG files for their logos, making them immediately usable across various digital and print platforms.

The decline is attributed to deliberate reinvestment in logistics, fulfillment, and expansion rather than a repeat of COVID-era shocks, with Shopee maintaining a strong competitive position against rivals like TikTok Shop. While acknowledging risks, the analysis suggests Sea Limited is poised for sustained growth and profitability.

feed.title: Orion Porfolio Solutions LLC Grows Holdings in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Orion Portfolio Solutions LLC increased its stake in Walmart Inc. (WMT) by 6.1% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 661,098 shares valued at $68.13 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Walmart, and analysts have issued various ratings, with the stock currently holding a "Moderate Buy" average rating and an average target price of $134.42. The article also details recent insider stock sales, key news impacting Walmart, and its financial performance.

feed.title: AutoZone, Inc. $AZO Shares Sold by NFC Investments LLC
feed.summary: NFC Investments LLC reduced its stake in AutoZone (AZO) by 7.0% in Q3, now owning 5,664 shares valued at $24.3 million. Despite insider selling activity, AutoZone reported a Q2 EPS beat and revenue growth of 8.2%, with management planning 350-360 new store openings in 2026. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target near $4,300, though some concerns exist regarding revenue shortfalls and margin pressure.

feed.title: O’Reilly Auto Parts to pay $5.6M to WA workers for pregnancy-related discriminations
feed.summary: O’Reilly Auto Parts will pay $5.6 million to more than 50 women in Washington state who alleged pregnancy-related discrimination and retaliation at its Puyallup distribution center. A lawsuit filed by the Washington Attorney General's Office accused the company of failing to provide reasonable accommodations and retaliating against workers who requested them. The settlement includes O'Reilly agreeing to implement training and new policies to comply with Washington’s Healthy Starts Act and provide biannual compliance reports to the Attorney General's Office for the next four years.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Price Target on Darden Restaurants to $215 From $200, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for Darden Restaurants (NYSE: DRI) from $200 to $215, while keeping a "Hold" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated valuation for the restaurant company. Other recent analyst actions include Citigroup maintaining a "Buy" rating with a target of $235 and Truist trimming its target to $206, reiterating a "Hold."

feed.title: HawkSearch By Bridgeline Enhances eCommerce Search for Global Industrial and Medical Gas Provider
feed.summary: Bridgeline Digital, Inc. announced that a global industrial and medical gas provider has selected its HawkSearch platform to enhance eCommerce search capabilities. HawkSearch will provide advanced on-site search, product discovery, multi-language support, and personalized customer journeys to improve engagement and conversion rates. The solution is designed to handle complex product catalogs and business requirements for global organizations.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Darden Restaurants to $235 From $234, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Darden Restaurants (DRI) to $235 from $234, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects Citigroup's continued positive outlook on the casual dining company. The article also notes recent adjustments from other analysts, including TD Cowen maintaining a Hold rating and Truist trimming its target, while Goldman Sachs and Mizuho also reiterated or upgraded their ratings with similar price targets.

feed.title: Mengis Capital Management Inc. Grows Position in The Clorox Company $CLX
feed.summary: Mengis Capital Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in The Clorox Company by 138.1% during the third quarter, now owning 34,383 shares valued at $4.239 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Invesco Ltd. also modified their holdings. Clorox recently released quarterly earnings, missing consensus estimates but announced an upcoming dividend of $1.24 per share.

feed.title: Whirlpool Picks Schneider Logistics for Port Services
feed.summary: Whirlpool Corp. has selected Schneider Logistics' subsidiary, American Port Services (APS), to manage port transloading, warehousing, and distribution services near the Port of Savannah, Georgia. This partnership aims to enhance Whirlpool's product distribution from Europe to U.S. customers, involving over 380,000 appliances annually. Schneider Logistics will reconfigure 500,000 square feet in two warehouses to facilitate the transloading of German-manufactured front-loading washers, streamlining Whirlpool's supply chain by removing a distribution step.

feed.title: Whirlpool Corp. Works To Better Meet the Needs of Multicultural Consumers
feed.summary: Whirlpool Corp. is actively working to better understand and serve multicultural consumers through its "Cultural Intelligence Series" initiative. This research-driven approach involves deep dives into the daily lives and experiences of diverse groups, including Black, Latin-X, Asian American, LGBTQ+, and consumers with disabilities, to ensure authentic connections and reduce biases in marketing and product development. The company aims to embed its core values of inclusion and diversity into all aspects of the consumer journey, from ideation to service, to truly improve life at home for a broad array of diverse consumers.

feed.title: JT Stratford LLC Has $6.92 Million Stock Position in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: JT Stratford LLC increased its stake in Walmart Inc. by 27.3% in the third quarter, holding 67,159 shares valued at approximately $6.92 million. Walmart recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.74 EPS and $190.66 billion in revenue, and issued positive FY2027 guidance. Despite significant insider selling, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $134.42.

feed.title: Victoria’s Secret posts longest sales growth streak in four years as shoppers return to Pink brand
feed.summary: Victoria's Secret exceeded Q4 earnings and revenue expectations, projecting better-than-expected sales growth for the year thanks to CEO Hillary Super's turnaround strategy. The company achieved its longest comparable sales growth streak in four years, driven by a consumer-responsive approach and a recommitment to its Pink brand. Despite the strong performance, the stock experienced a midday drop.

feed.title: VenHub Expands IP Portfolio, Advancing Smart Store Technology Leadership
feed.summary: VenHub Global, Inc. has expanded its intellectual property portfolio by highlighting seven new patent-pending technologies aimed at enhancing its smart store functionality. These innovations fall under "Smart Retail Infrastructure & Display Systems" and "Autonomous Retail Operations & Mobility," seeking to improve operational efficiency, customer experience, and scalability in autonomous retail environments. The company aims to solidify its position as a technology leader in the autonomous retail sector through these advancements.

feed.title: Kroger forecasts muted annual sales and profit as new CEO takes helm
feed.summary: Kroger, under new CEO Greg Foran, has forecast conservative annual sales and profit for 2026, with identical sales growth (excluding fuel) expected between 1% to 2% and adjusted profit per share between $5.10 and $5.30. This outlook is attributed to increased investments in customer value and gross margin improvements, despite beating fourth-quarter earnings estimates. The forecast reflects a cautious stance in an uncertain spending environment, similar to past actions by Walmart's CEO.

feed.title: McDonald’s C.E.O. Takes a Big Bite Out of a Burger. Maybe Scratch ‘Big.’
feed.summary: McDonald's CEO Chris Kempczinski's video promoting a new "Big Arch" burger went viral not for the burger itself, but for his seemingly unenthusiastic single bite. His lack of gusto drew online mirth and even snarky comments from competitors like Burger King and Wendy's, who playfully mocked his tentative eating style. Burger King subsequently reposted a video of its own CEO eating a Whopper with more apparent passion.

feed.title: Kroger Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: The Kroger Co. (KR) announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, driven by strategic initiatives and operational efficiencies. Key highlights include increased identical sales without fuel, significant operating profit, and robust eCommerce growth. The company also provided optimistic guidance for fiscal year 2026, anticipating continued sales growth and improved profitability.

feed.title: HawkSearch By Bridgeline Enhances eCommerce Search for Global Industrial and Medical Gas Provider
feed.summary: Bridgeline Digital, Inc. announced that a major global industrial and medical gas provider has selected HawkSearch to enhance its eCommerce search capabilities. This implementation aims to improve product discoverability, enable complex business requirements such as multi-language search and custom pricing, and ultimately increase engagement and conversion rates across its digital channels. HawkSearch's AI-powered tools and robust merchandising features are expected to streamline operations and support scalable growth for the client.

feed.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal 2025 Results
feed.summary: BJ’s Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, driven by growth in membership, digital sales, and traffic. The company reported increased net sales and membership fee income, along with significant growth in digitally enabled comparable sales. BJ's also detailed its expansion efforts, share repurchase program, and provided a positive outlook for fiscal 2026, including projected comparable club sales growth and adjusted EPS.

feed.title: GW&K Investment Management LLC Acquires 105,106 Shares of BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. $BJ
feed.summary: GW&K Investment Management LLC recently increased its stake in BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:BJ) by 14.6%, purchasing an additional 105,106 shares to bring its total holdings to 822,563 shares valued at $76,704,000. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with several other large firms also adjusting their positions in the wholesale retailer. The article also provides a company profile, recent price performance data, and an overview of analysts' ratings and insider trading activity for BJ's Wholesale Club.

feed.title: Insights into BJ's Wholesale Club Hldgs Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings (NYSE: BJ) reported its Q4 earnings, beating estimated EPS by 3.23% with earnings of $0.96 against an estimate of $0.93. Revenue also saw a significant increase compared to the previous year. The company provided guidance for FY 2026, forecasting earnings between $4.4 and $4.6 per share.

feed.title: GW&K Investment Management LLC Sells 368,649 Shares of Performance Food Group Company $PFGC
feed.summary: GW&K Investment Management LLC reduced its stake in Performance Food Group Company (NYSE:PFGC) by 27.0% in the third quarter, selling 368,649 shares and holding 996,370 shares valued at approximately $103.7 million. Despite missing quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, leading to several firms cutting price targets, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $116.44. Institutional investors and hedge funds own a significant 96.87% of the company's stock, with other major firms like Norges Bank and Massachusetts Financial Services Co. MA increasing their positions.

feed.title: Professional hair care brand Olaplex Holdings, Inc. recently released its performance guidance, indicating that the growth momentum of its net sales in the first quarter is expected to be weaker than the overall expectations set by the company for fiscal year 20
feed.summary: Olaplex Holdings, Inc. has issued performance guidance suggesting that its first-quarter net sales growth will be weaker than the company's overall expectations for fiscal year 2026. This indicates potential short-term pressure on quarterly performance, possibly not keeping pace with the anticipated growth for the entire fiscal year.

feed.title: Olaplex Holdings, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Olaplex Holdings, Inc. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, showing a modest 4.3% increase in Q4 net sales but an updated net loss of $13.1 million. For the full year, net sales were flat at $423.0 million, with a net loss of $9.3 million, a decline from the previous year's net income. The company highlighted its "Bonds & Beyond" transformation priorities, significant debt reduction, and provided a positive outlook for fiscal year 2026 with projected net sales between $414 million and $435 million.

feed.title: The Buckle, Inc. Reports February 2026 Net Sales and Announces Fourth Quarter Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: The Buckle, Inc. announced an 8.0 percent increase in comparable store net sales for the 4-week period ending February 28, 2026, and an 8.8 percent increase in total net sales to $84.4 million for the same period. The company also announced its fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025 earnings conference call for March 13, 2026. Buckle currently operates 440 retail stores across 42 states.
